mapper.select: select p.out_put_poll_id, p.execution_standard, p.first_date, p.check_frequency, p.plan_desc, p.submit_content, p.approval_opinion, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time, o.out_put_id, o.out_put_name, o.out_put_type, op.pollutant_code, pc.pollutant_name_cn, pc.pollutant_name_en, op.over_maxValue, op.over_minValue from t_env_manual_check_plan p left join t_ent_output_pollutant op on op.out_put_poll_id = p.out_put_poll_id left join t_bas_pollutant_code pc on pc.pollutant_code = op.pollutant_code left join t_ent_out_put_info o on o.out_put_id = op.out_put_id where p.out_put_poll_id = #{outPutPollId}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_env_manual_check_plan
out_put_poll_id, execution_standard, first_date, check_frequency, plan_desc, status,
#{outPutPollId}, #{executionStandard}, #{firstDate}, #{checkFrequency}, #{planDesc}, #{status},
